fields.implementation_summary: Testing-for-review policy hardening is in place for session-api e2e: hook script path is executed from an isolated temp workspace fixture, ingest runs against temp store roots, and persisted session assertions are fixture-scoped. This confirms deterministic and production-safe capture validation without live workspace store coupling.
fields.title: [audit-roadmap][file_length][batch-1d] memory-api tools+matrix tail (3)
fields.validation_summary: 2026-07-08 revalidation: `cd memory-api && cargo test -p session-api --test copilot_stop_hook_e2e` passed (4/4). Full suite `cd memory-api && cargo test -p session-api` passed (27 unit + 5 bin + 4 e2e + 0 doc). Deterministic fixture-only policy verified in copilot_stop_hook_e2e: tempdir-backed fixture workspaces, local fixture transcripts only, and explicit assertion preventing root-store leakage. Post-run filesystem check found no `.session/sessions/session-workspace-fixture-*` or `memory-api/.session/sessions/session-workspace-fixture-*` directories.

fields.implementation_summary: Session-api test hardening now includes a reusable isolated-fixture harness in integration tests: shared helpers centralize repo-root/cargo discovery, transcript fixture writes, shell quoting, and temp workspace setup for stop-hook execution. copilot_stop_hook_e2e now consumes this harness while preserving fixture-local and temp-store assertions, reducing duplication and making deterministic isolation easier to reuse in adjacent crates.
fields.title: [audit-roadmap][file_length][batch-1d] memory-api tools+matrix tail (3)
fields.validation_summary: 2026-07-08 hardening follow-up: extracted tests/common/fixture_harness.rs + tests/common/mod.rs and rewired copilot_stop_hook_e2e.rs. Post-run leak check again found no `.session/sessions/session-workspace-fixture-*` or `memory-api/.session/sessions/session-workspace-fixture-*` directories.
